title: 23andMe Founder Anne Wokcicki on Big Ideas
text:
# How 23andMe founder Anne Wojcicki revolutionized healthcare

## The co-founder and CEO of this groundbreaking healthcare company shares lessons from her entrepreneurial journey.

Capital One Business

November 18, 2025 | 66 min video

* [](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=undefined%3A%2F%2F%2Flearn-grow%2Fbusiness-resources%2Fyour-next-move-anne-wojcicki%2F)
* [](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?mini=true&url=undefined%3A%2F%2F%2Flearn-grow%2Fbusiness-resources%2Fyour-next-move-anne-wojcicki%2F&title=How%2023andMe%20founder%20Anne%20Wojcicki%20revolutionized%20healthcare)
* [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=undefined%3A%2F%2F%2Flearn-grow%2Fbusiness-resources%2Fyour-next-move-anne-wojcicki%2F)
* 

Working as a Wall Street analyst for more than a decade, Anne Wojcicki became convinced that the U.S. health care system didn't help people stay healthy. She co-founded her genetic-testing company 23andMe hoping to encourage consumers to take ownership of their health and make more personalized health care possible. ## Catch the highlights

Why resilience is more important than success How 23andMe learned to navigate the regulatory process The 2 factors that proved that 23andMe was ready to scale
